description:
Government Contracting 101: https://www.govclose.com

ONE PROGRAM. THREE PATHS.
Choose Your Track
Every GovClose graduate picks the path that fits their life 
1.Freelance Consulting
2. W2 Salaried Position as a Account Executive or Business Developer
2.Business owner selling propducts or services to the US Federal Government

Most combine two paths, building government contracting income alongside B2B income for serious long-term wealth.

This short video contains clips from the GovClose Workshop and Inner Circle event live in Houston, March of 2026. 

GovClose Certification Overview: https://www.govclose.com/govclose-certification-program

Schedule a Enrollment Consultation: https://www.govclose.com/enrollment-interview



Connect with Rick on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/govclose/
fulltitle: Start and Grow a Government Contract Business
